EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is deleting roles on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is creating role {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change a role on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is deleting role {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is changing role {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} viewed information about roles on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete a role on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create a role on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is viewing information about roles on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is viewing information about role {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete roles on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to view information about roles on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} viewed information about role {object.name} on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to view information about a role on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
